get_password: SELECT password from users WHERE user_id = %s
get_user: SELECT u.group_uuid, u.user_uuid, u.user_id, u.user_name, us.storage_uuid, s.storage_name, s.storage_type FROM users u JOIN user_storages us ON u.user_uuid = us.user_uuid JOIN storages s ON s.storage_uuid = us.storage_uuid WHERE u.user_id = %s AND us.is_default = 1
